news.title: Goldman Sachs’ India bets: 8 stocks rally up to 85% in CY26; one new addition
news.description: Goldman Sachs’ India equity portfolio fell 6% in CY26 amid mixed stock performance. While 18 stocks declined sharply, eight delivered strong gains, led by GNG Electronics, TD Power Systems, and Inox India.
